description_long: This object consists of several medicine boxes and packages displayed on top of circular, tiered platforms. The medicine packages are rectangular, primarily white, and feature printed labels with pharmaceutical branding and dosage information. The platforms are colored in white, gray, and orange, with one having a pink accent ring on its top edge. The packages are labeled with names such as 'Gasec 20 mg', 'PANTOZOL 20 mg', and 'DEVILANT 50mg', and some display the Acino logo. The arrangement suggests a promotional or display setup, with the medicine boxes standing upright and partially overlapping. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and organized, suitable for a healthcare or pharmacy context.
description: A group of white medicine boxes with printed labels are arranged on circular, colored display platforms, featuring pharmaceutical branding and dosage details.
description_view_0: Front view showing three medicine boxes with clear labels and branding, arranged on orange, gray, and white circular platforms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked arrangement of the platforms and the angled positioning of the medicine boxes.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back and side of the medicine boxes, with less visible label detail and more focus on the platform structure.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the plain backs of the medicine boxes and the stacked platforms, with minimal label visibility.
attribute_label_text: Gasec 20 mg acino PANTOZOL 20 mg DEVILANT 50mg acino
attribute_brand_logo: stylized letter A in orange and purple
